name: Young and aged mouse microbiota exchange across gut, eye, and brain aging readouts
summary: Animal study using fecal microbiota transplantation to exchange intestinal microbiota among young, old, and aged mice and assess gut barrier, retinal inflammation, CNS inflammation, cytokine signaling, metabolomics, and behavioral readouts.
model_system: Young, old, and aged mice, including young-to-aged and aged-to-young microbiota transfer
